name: Divine Southern Decadence Cake Ala Tuttle
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Unsalted butter, melted and cooled (1 stick)
7 oz Sweetened flaked coconut, toasted (about 3 cups)
recipeInstructions:
For the Crust:
1. Butter and flour a 10-inch springform pan.
2. In a bowl, combine well the wafer crumbs and 1/4 cup of the melted butter; pat the mixture onto the bottom of the prepared pan.
3. In another bowl, stir together well the coconut (well cooled) and the remaining 1/4 cup butter; pat the mixture 1 inch up the side of the pan.
For the Batter:
1. In a bowl with an electric mixer, cream together the butter and brown sugar until the mixture is light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs, 1 at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Beat in the melted chocolate, instant coffee powder, Frangelico (hazelnut liqueur), flour, and chopped cashews.
To Assemble:
1. Pour the batter into the crust and bake in the middle of a preheated 375°F oven for 30 minutes, or until set.
2. Let the cake cool completely in the pan on a rack and chill it, covered, overnight.
3. Run a thin knife around the edge of the pan and remove the side of the pan.
For the Topping:
1. In a chilled bowl, beat heavy cream until it just holds stiff peaks.
2. Spread the whipped cream over the sides and top of the cake.
3. Garnish with chocolate curls.
